review_title: DontGo Chat is the way to go!
description: Overall, we have had a great experience. I can only imagine it getting better as AI tech grows. Thanks a lot, DontGo!
author: Robert W.
pros: Having DontGo has allowed us to offer 24/7 chat on our website, without having to outsource, or have staff available 24/7.
cons: It can be a bit pricey, but when compared to having full time staff man the phones/chat it ends up being a no brainer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We set up a designated 800 number and form. By utilizing the patented exit intent and with the outstanding experience provided, we were able to track $2.2M in additional revenue at Hansons in 2015.
author: Brian E.

description: We were initially having some difficulty with setting up the program because of a lack of communication from our website support team. Don'tGo representatives were a big help in making all ends meet. Now we are watching our leads and the actions they tend to take.
author: Portia G.

description: Gutters are the kind of business where we know if someone hits our website, in that moment they have a problem and we have the solution. DontGo gives us greatly enhanced communication capabilities and insures we do all we can to grab them as a customer.
author: David E.
pros: The exit intent technology stops everyone who is leaving without engaging and the speed and accuracy of the answers makes us look very good with our customers

description: The staff does a great job of explaining how everything works. From the initial call, to getting the account set up, it is very well run. All calls and emails are answered in a timely manner. It is easy to modify the campaign as needed.
author: Jordan L.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I believe this could be a great system if there was more traffic using it, I do believe it can or has saved a bit of additional business but may work even better if the person that is trying to leave the site is offered an additional savings for moving forward with their search.
author: Johnny F.
pros: That it does give potential clients the opportunity to stay on the site and communicate with the company.
cons: I believe that the reporting should be more frequent
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Capture leads that would've otherwise left your website
description: Our experience with Amanda and the rest of the team at Don't Go has been great. After installing the snippet on our site the live chat was running immediately, collecting additional form fills and phone calls that we would've been missing without it.
author: Andrew P.
pros: This software provides real ROI for the visitors that are already leaving your site.
cons: To the savvy user, the chat can seem automated, or in the worst-case scenario, a pop-up.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Please Dont Go with anyone else!
description: Everything from set up to launching and starting to use the software has been a breeze. No complaints here. Already bringing in customers and creating revenue.
author: Alayna T.
pros: Easy to use and understand. User friendly. Our customers like the features and get some of their questions answered up front.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A better service as it only appears when a visitor is about to leave and only on specific pages. However, there still hasn't been much of an ROI with some people interacting but almost none filling out a form and becoming a lead.
author: Samantha B.
pros: That it only appears when someone is about to leave and is customizable based on "leaving behavior" and also which pages it appears.
cons: Doesn't integrate with CRM platform and is a bot that is clearly a bot.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very easy install on my website. Awesome customer service. My rep Amanda is very attentive and makes sure all of my needs are being met.
author: Dave W.
